serviceDescription: Amazon Polly is a service that turns text into lifelike speech, allowing you to create applications that talk, and build entirely new categories of speech-enabled products.

serviceSelector.title: Amazon Polly
serviceSelector.description: Select Amazon Polly Options that you want to estimate
serviceSelector.infoDescription: With Amazon Polly, you only pay for what you use. You are charged based on the number of characters of text that you convert either to speech or to Speech Marks metadata. In addition, you can cache and replay Amazon Polly’s generated speech at no additional cost. Information about Neural Text-to-Speech availability can be found in Polly documentation from the link below.
